holdings.infoBox: KOMP is an equity ETF with a total of 485 individual holdings. The top holdings are Elbit Systems stock at 1.57%, ON Semiconductor at 1.22%, Bloom Energy at 1.15%, Twist Bioscience at 1.02%, and Teledyne Technologies at 1.01%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Kensho New Economies Composite ETF (KOMP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Kensho New Economies Composite index. The fund tracks a tier-weighted index of US-listed companies with products or services that disrupt traditional industries. KOMP was launched on Oct 22, 2018 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: S&P Kensho New Economies Composite Index
